# signoz_notification_channel (Resource)

A SigNoz notification channel (Slack, webhook, PagerDuty, email, OpsGenie, MS Teams). **Write operations require an admin Service Account token.** The receiver config goes in `data` as JSON.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Notification channels require an ADMIN SigNoz service-account token.
resource "signoz_notification_channel" "slack" {
  name = "team-alerts"
  data = jsonencode({
    slack_configs = [{
      send_resolved = true
      api_url       = "https://hooks.slack.com/services/T000/B000/XXXX"
      channel       = "#alerts"
    }]
  })
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `data` (String) Receiver configuration as JSON, e.g. `{"slack_configs":[{"api_url":"…","channel":"#alerts"}]}`. Compared semantically.
- `name` (String) Unique channel name.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Server-assigned channel id.
